args.report:
FIRST AMENDMENT TO COMMERCIAL LEASE AGREEMENT

This FIRST AMENDMENT TO COMMERCIAL LEASE AGREEMENT (this "Amendment") is made as of [TBD] (the "Effective Date"), by and between [TBD], a [TBD] ("Landlord"), and [TBD], a [TBD] ("Tenant"). Landlord and Tenant are sometimes referred to individually as a "Party" and collectively as the "Parties."

RECITALS

A. Landlord and Tenant are parties to that certain Commercial Lease Agreement dated as of [TBD] (the "Original Lease"), pursuant to which Tenant leases from Landlord certain premises commonly known as [TBD] and more particularly described in the Original Lease (the "Premises").

B. The Original Lease, as it may have been previously amended, modified, or supplemented by [if applicable, insert reference to prior amendments: e.g., that certain First Amendment to Commercial Lease dated as of [TBD]] (collectively, the "Lease"), is in full force and effect as of the Effective Date.

C. Landlord and Tenant desire to amend the Lease solely to modify the monthly Base Rent payable under the Lease, on the terms and conditions set forth in this Amendment, and to confirm that, except as expressly modified herein, all other terms and conditions of the Lease remain unchanged and in full force and effect.

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and agreements contained in this Amendment and in the Lease, and for other good and valuable consideration, the receipt and sufficiency of which are hereby acknowledged, Landlord and Tenant agree as follows:

1. MODIFICATION OF BASE RENT.

1.1 Base Rent. Notwithstanding anything to the contrary in the Lease, effective as of [TBD] (the "Rent Adjustment Date"), the monthly Base Rent payable by Tenant to Landlord for the Premises shall be [TBD] Dollars ($[TBD]) per month (the "New Base Rent"), payable in advance on the first day of each calendar month in accordance with the terms of the Lease.

1.2 No Change to Additional Rent. Except as expressly set forth in Section 1.1 above, all other monetary obligations of Tenant under the Lease, including without limitation any additional rent, operating expense reimbursements, common area maintenance charges, taxes, insurance, utilities, and any other charges or sums payable by Tenant under the Lease (collectively, "Additional Rent"), shall remain unchanged and shall continue to be calculated, billed, and paid in accordance with the terms of the Lease.

1.3 Proration. If the Rent Adjustment Date is a day other than the first day of a calendar month, the New Base Rent for the partial month in which the Rent Adjustment Date occurs shall be prorated on a per diem basis, based on a thirty (30) day month, and Tenant shall pay such prorated New Base Rent in accordance with the Lease.

1.4 References to Base Rent. All references in the Lease to "Base Rent" (or words of similar import) for periods on and after the Rent Adjustment Date shall be deemed to refer to the New Base Rent set forth in this Amendment.

2. RATIFICATION; NO OTHER CHANGES.

2.1 Ratification of Lease. Except as expressly modified by this Amendment, the Lease is hereby ratified and confirmed in all respects and shall remain in full force and effect. The Parties acknowledge and agree that, as of the Effective Date, the Lease (as amended by this Amendment) is valid, binding, and enforceable against each of them in accordance with its terms, and that neither Party has any current knowledge of any existing defaults by the other Party under the Lease.

2.2 No Other Modifications. This Amendment is limited solely to the matters expressly set forth herein. No other provisions of the Lease are amended, modified, or waived by this Amendment, and all terms, covenants, and conditions of the Lease not expressly amended hereby shall continue in full force and effect.

2.3 Conflicts. In the event of any conflict or inconsistency between the terms and conditions of this Amendment and the terms and conditions of the Lease, the terms and conditions of this Amendment shall control with respect to the subject matter hereof. In all other respects, the terms and conditions of the Lease shall control.

3. REPRESENTATIONS; AUTHORITY.

3.1 Representations. Each Party represents and warrants to the other that (a) it has full power and authority to enter into this Amendment and to perform its obligations hereunder, (b) this Amendment has been duly authorized, executed, and delivered by such Party, and (c) this Amendment constitutes the legal, valid, and binding obligation of such Party, enforceable against such Party in accordance with its terms, subject to applicable bankruptcy, insolvency, and other laws affecting creditors' rights generally and to general principles of equity.

3.2 Authority of Signatories. Each individual executing this Amendment on behalf of a Party represents and warrants that he or she is duly authorized to execute and deliver this Amendment on behalf of such Party and that no further consent, approval, or authorization is required as a condition to the enforceability of this Amendment against such Party.

4. MISCELLANEOUS.

4.1 Counterparts; Electronic Signatures. This Amendment may be executed in one or more counterparts, each of which shall be deemed an original and all of which together shall constitute one and the same instrument. Signatures delivered by facsimile, email (in .pdf or similar format), or by other electronic means intended to preserve the original graphic and pictorial appearance of a document shall be deemed to be original signatures for all purposes.

4.2 Governing Law. This Amendment shall be governed by, and construed in accordance with, the laws of the State of [TBD], without regard to its conflicts of law principles.

4.3 Successors and Assigns. This Amendment shall be binding upon and inure to the benefit of the Parties and their respective successors and permitted assigns under the Lease.

4.4 No Third-Party Beneficiaries. This Amendment is made and entered into solely for the benefit of Landlord and Tenant and their respective successors and permitted assigns, and no other person or entity shall be deemed to be a third-party beneficiary of this Amendment.

4.5 Further Assurances. Each Party agrees to execute and deliver such additional documents and to take such further actions as may be reasonably necessary or appropriate to carry out the intent and purposes of this Amendment.

4.6 Entire Agreement. The Lease, as amended by this Amendment, constitutes the entire agreement between the Parties with respect to the subject matter thereof and hereof, and supersedes all prior and contemporaneous understandings, agreements, negotiations, and representations, whether oral or written, with respect to such subject matter.

4.7 No Waiver. No waiver by either Party of any breach or default under this Amendment or the Lease shall be deemed a waiver of any other breach or default, whether of a similar or different nature, and no waiver shall be effective unless in writing and signed by the Party against whom enforcement is sought.

5. ATTORNEY-REVIEW / NO-LEGAL-ADVICE DISCLAIMER.

5.1 No Legal or Tax Advice. This Amendment has been prepared based on limited information provided and is intended as a general template only. It does not constitute legal, tax, or other professional advice to either Party. The Parties acknowledge that the allocation of risks and obligations in this Amendment and in the Lease may have significant legal and financial consequences.

5.2 Independent Counsel. Each Party is strongly encouraged to consult with its own independent legal counsel, tax advisor, and other professional advisors of its choosing before signing this Amendment or the Lease. By signing this Amendment, each Party represents that it has had the opportunity to seek such independent advice and either (a) has done so, or (b) has voluntarily elected not to do so and to proceed without such advice.

5.3 No Attorney-Client Relationship with Drafter. The drafter of this Amendment is not acting as attorney for either Party, and no attorney-client relationship is created by the preparation, review, or delivery of this document. The Parties should not rely on this document as a substitute for advice from qualified legal counsel licensed in the relevant jurisdiction.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Amendment as of the Effective Date.

LANDLORD:

[TBD], a [TBD]

By: ________________________________
Name: [TBD]
Title: [TBD]

Date: ______________________________
